{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Officer",
  "description": "Nlightin serves a diverse customer base across various industries and sectors, reflecting the broad scope of its operations. Nlightin provides industrial equipment, operation and maintenance services for energy companies across various sectors such as Oil and Gas, Healthcare and transportation or logistics. Providing cutting edge technology and equipment to enhance and optimize their processes and deliver better to their customer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Positin: Operations Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Operations Officer to oversee and optimize our supply chain processes while managing our vehicle leasing portfolio.
	The ideal candidate will ensure operational efficiency, cost control, and seamless coordination between vendors, internal departments, and external partners.


Key Responsibilities
Supply Chain Management:


	Coordinate procurement, inventory control, and distribution processes.
	Monitor supplier performance and negotiate contracts to ensure cost-effectiveness and quality standards.
	Maintain accurate records of orders, deliveries, and stock levels.
	Identify and implement process improvements to enhance operational efficiency.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.


Vehicle Lease Management:


	Oversee the company&rsquo;s vehicle leasing portfolio, including contract negotiation and renewals.
	Monitor vehicle utilization, maintenance schedules, and compliance requirements.
	Liaise with leasing companies and service providers to ensure timely servicing and cost control.
	Track lease costs and prepare periodic reports on fleet performance and expenses.
	Ensure proper documentation and insurance coverage for all leased vehicles.


Operational Support &amp; Reporting:


	Prepare operational reports and performance metrics for management review.
	Collaborate with finance, logistics, and administrative teams to streamline workflows.
	Support budgeting and forecasting related to supply chain and fleet operations.
	Ensure adherence to health, safety, and regulatory standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering, Business Administration, Logistics, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3&ndash;5 years of experience in operations of fleet/vehicle lease management.
	Strong knowledge of procurement processes and fleet management systems.
	Excellent negotiation, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in MS Office and supply chain management software.
	Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities effectively.


Key Competencies:


	Strategic thinking and decision-making
	Vendor and stakeholder management
	Cost control and budget monitoring
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of integrity and accountability.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for professional growth and development
	Dynamic and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;recruit@nlightin.net&nbsp;using &quot;Operations Officer Application&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Operations Officer Job at Nlightin




        
    

        
        Nlightin serves a diverse customer base across various industries and sectors, reflecting the broad scope of its operations. Nlightin provides industrial equipment, operation and maintenance services for energy companies across various sectors such as Oil and Gas, Healthcare and transportation or logistics. Providing cutting edge technology and equipment to enhance and optimize their processes and deliver better to their customer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Positin: Operations Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Operations Officer to oversee and optimize our supply chain processes while managing our vehicle leasing portfolio.
	The ideal candidate will ensure operational efficiency, cost control, and seamless coordination between vendors, internal departments, and external partners.


Key Responsibilities
Supply Chain Management:


	Coordinate procurement, inventory control, and distribution processes.
	Monitor supplier performance and negotiate contracts to ensure cost-effectiveness and quality standards.
	Maintain accurate records of orders, deliveries, and stock levels.
	Identify and implement process improvements to enhance operational efficiency.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.


Vehicle Lease Management:


	Oversee the company’s vehicle leasing portfolio, including contract negotiation and renewals.
	Monitor vehicle utilization, maintenance schedules, and compliance requirements.
	Liaise with leasing companies and service providers to ensure timely servicing and cost control.
	Track lease costs and prepare periodic reports on fleet performance and expenses.
	Ensure proper documentation and insurance coverage for all leased vehicles.


Operational Support & Reporting:


	Prepare operational reports and performance metrics for management review.
	Collaborate with finance, logistics, and administrative teams to streamline workflows.
	Support budgeting and forecasting related to supply chain and fleet operations.
	Ensure adherence to health, safety, and regulatory standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business Administration, Logistics, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in operations of fleet/vehicle lease management.
	Strong knowledge of procurement processes and fleet management systems.
	Excellent negotiation, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in MS Office and supply chain management software.
	Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities effectively.


Key Competencies:


	Strategic thinking and decision-making
	Vendor and stakeholder management
	Cost control and budget monitoring
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of integrity and accountability.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for professional growth and development
	Dynamic and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: recruit@nlightin.net using "Operations Officer Application" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Sterling Homes Limited is a private limited liability company incorporated in, 2010, by the Corporate Affairs Commission, Abuja, Nigeria, under the Companies and Allied Matters Act (CAMA) 1990. Our incorporation number is RC.894767.&nbsp;We are a real estate housing development, investment and allied Services Company.

We are poised to do real estate excellently, reinventing the way real estate business is managed in Africa and giving customer service delivery a new outlook. Our mission is to be one of the top ten home providers for individuals and corporate bodies in the next five years. We buy lands, finance real estate deals, build or have builders build projects, create, imagine, control and orchestrate the process of development from the beginning to the end.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Develoment Executive
Job Locations:&nbsp;Lagos and Kwara
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Increase sales revenue through strategic planning
	Identify potential leads and them into customers
	Develop and implement plans that balance financial gain with customer satisfaction.


Requirements


	A B.Sc&nbsp;Degree&nbsp; /HND in any field (Sales/Marketing background is an advantage).?
	Excellent communication and persuasive skills.
	Strong understanding of marketing and negotiation techniques?.
	Compensation.


Salary and Benefits


	N80,000 - N120,000 per month
	HMO
	Pension
	Commission- 10% on land and 5% on Housing Once sales target met.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@sterlinghomesltd.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more information, contact the recruiter via: 09031216666.",

Business Develoment Executive Job at Sterling Homes Limited




        
    

        
        Sterling Homes Limited is a private limited liability company incorporated in, 2010, by the Corporate Affairs Commission, Abuja, Nigeria, under the Companies and Allied Matters Act (CAMA) 1990. Our incorporation number is RC.894767. We are a real estate housing development, investment and allied Services Company.

We are poised to do real estate excellently, reinventing the way real estate business is managed in Africa and giving customer service delivery a new outlook. Our mission is to be one of the top ten home providers for individuals and corporate bodies in the next five years. We buy lands, finance real estate deals, build or have builders build projects, create, imagine, control and orchestrate the process of development from the beginning to the end.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Develoment Executive
Job Locations: Lagos and Kwara
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Increase sales revenue through strategic planning
	Identify potential leads and them into customers
	Develop and implement plans that balance financial gain with customer satisfaction.


Requirements


	A B.Sc Degree  /HND in any field (Sales/Marketing background is an advantage).?
	Excellent communication and persuasive skills.
	Strong understanding of marketing and negotiation techniques?.
	Compensation.


Salary and Benefits


	N80,000 - N120,000 per month
	HMO
	Pension
	Commission- 10% on land and 5% on Housing Once sales target met.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@sterlinghomesltd.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, contact the recruiter via: 09031216666.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hotel Manager",
  "description": "Invealth Partners Limited is an Investment and Management company with a focus on creating investment opportunities and strategic partnerships in the African continent. The company is poised to create efficiency and viability in the Infrastructure, healthcare, energy, retail and commodity sector while attracting investment and management of this portfolio to ensure sustainable growth and directly impact on service delivery across targeted ecosystems.&nbsp; Invealths strategy is one that takes advantage of the need for entry into the African opportunity marmet and developes strategies, models and vehicles that are familiar to investors especially financial management and value growth over an acceptable period. Job Position:&nbsp;Hotel Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking to hire a well experienced Hotel Manager to oversee all aspects of our hotel operations.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong background in hospitality management and a passion for delivering exceptional guest experiences.
	The Hotel Manager will be responsible for the overall management and operation of the hotel, ensuring high standards of guest satisfaction, operational efficiency, and profitability.
	This role involves strategic planning, financial management, staff leadership, and maintaining the hotel&#39;s reputation for excellence.


Main Duties


	Develop and implement strategic plans to enhance hotel performance and guest experience
	Monitor industry trends and implement innovative practices to maintain competitiveness
	Oversee budget preparation and management for all departments
	Analyze financial reports and implement strategies to optimize revenue and control costs
	Ensure smooth daily operations across all departments
	Implement and maintain quality control standards for all hotel services
	Ensure delivery of exceptional guest experiences
	Handle guest complaints and feedback effectively
	Lead, motivate, and develop a high-performing team
	Oversee recruitment, training, and performance management of staff&nbsp;
	Collaborate with the marketing team to develop effective promotional strategies
	Build and maintain relationships with key clients and partners
	Ensure compliance with all relevant health, safety, and environmental regulations
	Implement and maintain emergency and security procedures


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in hotel management, with at least 3 years in a management role in a hotel in Port-Harcourt.
	Must be a Port-Harcourt resident
	Strong financial acumen and experience in budgeting and revenue management
	Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills
	Proficiency in hotel management software systems.


Salary Range
N250,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Other Benefits:


	Health Cover
	Leave Allowance

Hotel Manager Job at Invealth Partners Limited

Invealth Partners Limited is an Investment and Management company with a focus on creating investment opportunities and strategic partnerships in the African continent. The company is poised to create efficiency and viability in the Infrastructure, healthcare, energy, retail and commodity sector while attracting investment and management of this portfolio to ensure sustainable growth and directly impact on service delivery across targeted ecosystems.  Invealths strategy is one that takes advantage of the need for entry into the African opportunity marmet and developes strategies, models and vehicles that are familiar to investors especially financial management and value growth over an acceptable period. Our company and processes are designed to give investor confidence, and we have a due diligence process that ensures that we only partner in the value based solutions.

Invealth Partners serve to create a link between business opportunities and investors, either private or institutional, with a mid to long-term overview. Our business focus is guided by a strong Environment, Social and Government partnership justification. Africa is the next investment destination…Invealth provides the strategic partnership that provides holistic value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking to hire a well experienced Hotel Manager to oversee all aspects of our hotel operations.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong background in hospitality management and a passion for delivering exceptional guest experiences.
	The Hotel Manager will be responsible for the overall management and operation of the hotel, ensuring high standards of guest satisfaction, operational efficiency, and profitability.
	This role involves strategic planning, financial management, staff leadership, and maintaining the hotel's reputation for excellence.


Main Duties


	Develop and implement strategic plans to enhance hotel performance and guest experience
	Monitor industry trends and implement innovative practices to maintain competitiveness
	Oversee budget preparation and management for all departments
	Analyze financial reports and implement strategies to optimize revenue and control costs
	Ensure smooth daily operations across all departments
	Implement and maintain quality control standards for all hotel services
	Ensure delivery of exceptional guest experiences
	Handle guest complaints and feedback effectively
	Lead, motivate, and develop a high-performing team
	Oversee recruitment, training, and performance management of staff 
	Collaborate with the marketing team to develop effective promotional strategies
	Build and maintain relationships with key clients and partners
	Ensure compliance with all relevant health, safety, and environmental regulations
	Implement and maintain emergency and security procedures


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in hotel management, with at least 3 years in a management role in a hotel in Port-Harcourt.
	Must be a Port-Harcourt resident
	Strong financial acumen and experience in budgeting and revenue management
	Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills
	Proficiency in hotel management software systems.


Salary Range
N250,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Other Benefits:


	Health Cover
	Leave
